{{Quote|And your asteroid is a garden?|[[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]]|<ref name="DW" />}}
After the execution of [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]], [[Ferus Olin]] and [[Trever Flume]] set up a secret asteroid base, known as the '''Jedi asteroid''', in the centre of an atmospheric storm near [[Acherin]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]].

==History==
The [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] was found when rebels [[Raina Quill]] and [[Toma (resistance leader)|Toma]], tracked by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents, were forced to hide their ship in the storm over [[Acherin]]. By landing on the asteroid, the Imperials were unwilling to traverse the dangers of the storm, such as [[space shear]]s, and would be unable to track them. Raina and Toma stayed on the asteroid for days while their passengers, [[Ferus Olin]], [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]], and [[Trever Flume]] went to [[Ilum/Legends|Ilum]] to rescue hidden [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]], [[Garen Muln]].

Raina and Toma spent a few days on the asteroid with enough food and supplies to last them. When the trio returned with Garen, as well as more supplies and prefab shelters, donated by [[Roan Lands]], Raina set up a makeshift clinic and used her medical skills to help the malnourished Garen recover. Ferus Olin thanked Raina and Toma for all of their help and offered them a chance to help him recover more Jedi survivors and use the asteroid as a safe haven. Raina and Toma gladly agreed.

After setting up the living areas nursery and medical ward, the base was fully operational. Trever then began to bring friends and associates of Ferus back to the base to help it grow and thrive.

In [[18 BBY/Legends|18 BBY]], the asteroid's fate was sealed when it was discovered by [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]], with the help of [[Eve Yarrow]], or "Flame," and was [[Twilight (operation)|destroyed]] by a superweapon, attached to the [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord's]] [[Unidentified Star Destroyer (Twilight)|Star Destroyer]], killing everyone in the hidden base, except Obi-Wan, Trever and Ferus, who were on [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] when it was destroyed.

{{Ast-stub}}
